name: TC-02: Admin Login with Wrong Password
description: Admin login with invalid password displays a credentials error message.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type wrongpassword in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Verify the URL remains /login and an error alert panel is displayed
Verify the error alert panel contains a message indicating failed login
